mapper.sql: grant_id, object_id, version_id, principal_type, principal_value, permission, expires_at, created_by, created_at, revoked_at
mapper.insert: insert into oss_access_grant () values (#{grantId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{objectId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{versionId,jdbcType=BINARY}, #{principalType}, #{principalValue}, #{permission}, #{expiresAt}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt}, #{revokedAt}) on duplicate key update principal_type = values(principal_type), principal_value = values(principal_value), permission = values(permission), expires_at = values(expires_at), revoked_at = values(revoked_at)
